prompt: Create a crisp 16:9 technical system map poster for a dark professional AI operations product named NEXUS V22. Show a central graph workflow canvas with independent Input nodes, LLM nodes with reasoning controls, Image/Video generation nodes with quality and aspect controls, compiler layers attached to file inputs, artifact history/download storage, and a future Brain Controller observing telemetry. Style: sophisticated product architecture diagram, clean vector-like UI, charcoal background, neutral zinc panels, subtle green status accents, readable labels, no tiny unreadable text, no logos, no people, no decorative blobs.

error.message: Invalid value: 'standard'. Supported values are: 'low', 'medium', 'high', and 'auto'.
